func1.desc1: Access Inställningar page for Assistent you want to Skicka through Inställningar in upper right corner of Konversation window;
func1.desc2: Klicka 'Skicka to Assistent Marketplace' button in upper right corner.
func1.title: Skicka via LobeChat

func2.desc: If you want to Lägg till Assistent to index, Skapa an entry using agent-template.json or agent-template-Fullständig.json in plugins directory, write a brief Beskrivning, tag appropriately, och then Skapa a pull request.
func2.title: Skicka via GitHub

hybrid.desc: Denna tjänst can run locally or in cloud depending on Konfiguration or usage scenario, offering dual operation capability.
hybrid.title: Hybrid Service

local.desc: This server can only run on client’s local device, requiring installation och relying on local resources.
local.title: Local Service

remote.desc: This server is hosted remotely because it mainly depends on remote services och does not rely on local environment.
remote.title: Cloud Service

steps.claude:
- Open **Claude Desktop** app
- Go to **Inställningar**, then Välj **Developer**
- Klicka **Redigera Konfiguration**
- Open **claude_desktop_config.json** Fil
- Copy och paste server Konfiguration into existing Fil, then Spara
steps.cline:
- Open VS Code med Cline extension Installerad
- Klicka Cline icon in sidebar
- Välj **MCP Servers** från dropdown menu
- In **Remote Servers** tab, Ange server Namn och your MCP server URL
- Klicka **Lägg till Server** to connect
steps.cursor:
- Navigate to **Inställningar**, then Välj Cursor Inställningar
- Välj **MCP** on left
- Klicka **Lägg till New Global MCP Server** at top right
- Copy och paste server Konfiguration into existing Fil, then Spara
steps.lobeChat:
- Open **LobeChat Desktop** app
- Go to **Inställningar** - **Standard Assistent**
- Then Välj **Plugin Inställningar** - **Anpassad Plugins**
- Klicka **Quick Importera JSON Konfiguration**
- Copy och paste server Konfiguration into Text box, then Installera
steps.openai:
- Open your **OpenAI app** or development environment
- Configure MCP tools in **Responses API**
- Lägg till MCP blocks to **tools** array in API requests
- Set **server_url** to your MCP server endpoint
- Include Krävs authentication headers (API-nyckel, Token, etc.)
- Use `allowed_tools` parameter to restrict exposed tools
- Set `require_approval` to control tool execution approval
steps.vscode:
- Open VS Code
- Open command palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`)
- Typ **MCP: Lägg till Server** och Välj it
- Välj to Lägg till to workspace or user Inställningar
- Copy och paste server Konfiguration

githubBadge.desc:
LobeHub regularly scans code repositories och documentation to:

- Bekräfta MCP server operational Status.
- Extract server features such as tools, resources, prompts, och Krävs parameters.
- Our badge helps users quickly assess MCP server security, feature set, och installation instructions.

Please copy following code into your `README.md` Fil:

frequency_penalty.desc: Denna inställning adjusts frequency at which Modell reuses specific vocabulary som has already appeared in input. Higher values reduce likelihood of such repetition, while negative values har opposite effect. Vocabulary penalties do not increase med frequency of occurrence. Negative values encourage vocabulary reuse.
frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty

max_tokens.desc: Denna inställning defines maximum length som Modell can generate in a single Svar. Setting a higher value allows Modell to produce longer replies, while a lower value restricts length of Svar, making it Mer concise. Adjusting denna value appropriately based on different application scenarios can help achieve desired Svar length och level of detail.
max_tokens.title: Single Svar Limit

presence_penalty.desc: Denna inställning aims to control reuse of vocabulary based on its frequency in input. It attempts to use Mindre of those words som appear Mer frequently in input, med usage frequency proportional to occurrence frequency. Vocabulary penalties increase med frequency of occurrence. Negative values encourage vocabulary reuse.
presence_penalty.title: Topic Freshness

reasoning_effort.desc: Denna inställning controls intensity of reasoning Modell applies before Genererar a Svar. Low intensity prioritizes Svar speed och saves Tokens, while high intensity provides Mer comprehensive reasoning but consumes Mer Tokens och slows down Svar time. The Standard value is medium, balancing reasoning accuracy med Svar speed.
reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Intensity

temperature.desc: Denna inställning affects diversity of Modell's responses. Lower values lead to Mer predictable och typical responses, while higher values encourage Mer diverse och Mindre common responses. When set to 0, Modell always gives same Svar to a given input.
temperature.title: Randomness

top_p.desc: Denna inställning limits Modell's selection to a certain proportion of most likely vocabulary: only selecting those top words whose cumulative probability reaches P. Lower values make Modell's responses Mer predictable, while Standard setting allows Modell to Välj från entire range of vocabulary.
top_p.title: Nucleus Sampling

providerInfo.apiTooltip: LobeChat supports using a Anpassad API-nyckel for denna Leverantör.
providerInfo.latencyTooltip: Average Svar time for Leverantör to send first Token
providerInfo.maxOutputTooltip: Maximum number of Tokens denna endpoint can generate
providerInfo.throughputTooltip: Average number of Tokens transmitted per second for stream requests
